tasks.subject: Task 1: Engine skeleton, gemspec, core exclusion, test harness
tasks.description: Loadable mountable engine + Combustion dummy + smoke test; core gem excludes chrono_forge-dashboard/. Verify: cd chrono_forge-dashboard && bundle exec rake test

tasks.subject: Task 2: Configuration + fail-closed auth
tasks.description: Config object + BaseController authenticate! (hook → http_basic → :none → raise). Verify: bundle exec ruby -Itest test/auth_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 3: Step-name parser
tasks.description: Pure parser: execute/wait/repeat-coordination/repeat-run; unknown preserved, never raises. Verify: test/step_name_parser_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 4: Query objects (WorkflowsQuery, StatsQuery)
tasks.description: Filter/paginate list; zero-filled state counts. Verify: test/queries_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 5: Workflows#index — list, filters, stats, pagination
tasks.description: List page with badges/filters/stats/pager + controller tests. Verify: test/workflows_index_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 6: Timeline + Context presenters
tasks.description: Replay timeline (repetition rollup, current position) + typed context nodes/size. Verify: test/presenters_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 8: Periodic health + wait-state presenters and wait-states index
tasks.description: durably_repeat health, wait-state age model, wait-states list flagging long waiters. Verify: test/periodic_and_wait_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 7: Workflows#show — timeline, context tree, errors, wait callout
tasks.description: Detail page wiring presenters + error logs + wait callout. Verify: test/workflows_show_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 9: Operational actions (retry, unlock, bulk retry)
tasks.description: POST retry/unlock/bulk_retry, guarded (non-retryable flashes), CSRF+auth. Verify: test/actions_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 10: Assets controller + CSS/JS (polling, tree, sparklines, confirms)
tasks.description: Engine-served CSS/JS (no host pipeline) + vanilla JS behaviors. Verify: test/assets_test.rb

tasks.subject: Task 11: README + install docs for the dashboard gem
tasks.description: Dashboard README (install/mount/auth) + core README Dashboard section. Verify: grep -n 'Dashboard' README.md
